height.description:
Sets the `height` in pixels of the editor/preview area or pass `full` to allow
the EuiMarkdownEditor to fill the height of its container.
When in `full` mode the vertical resize is not allowed.

onChange.description: callback function when markdown content is modified

readOnly.description: Sets the current display mode to a read-only state. All editing gets resctricted.

placeholder.description: Sets the placeholder of the textarea

editorId.description:
a unique ID to attach to the textarea. If one isn't provided, a random one
will be generated

maxHeight.description:
Sets the `max-height` in pixels of the editor/preview area.
It has no effect when the `height` is set to `full`.

autoExpandPreview.description: Automatically adjusts the preview height to fit all the content and avoid a scrollbar.

parsingPluginList.description: plugins to identify new syntax and parse it into an AST node

processingPluginList.description: plugins to process the markdown AST nodes into a React nodes

uiPlugins.description: defines UI for plugins' buttons in the toolbar as well as any modals or extra UI that provides content to the editor

onParse.type: (error: EuiMarkdownParseError, data: { messages: VFileMessage[]; ast: EuiMarkdownAstNode; }) => void
onParse.description: callback triggered when parsing results are available

initialViewMode.description: initial display mode for the editor

markdownFormatProps.description: Further extend the props applied to EuiMarkdownFormat

toolbarProps.description: Props to customize the toolbar. `right` replaces the default preview/editor toggle with custom content.

showFooter.description: Controls whether the footer is shown
